ranked_signals.title: US Federal Reserve Signals Extended Rate Hold Through 2026 -- Global Monetary Policy Divergence Widens
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Fed rate hold at 4.5% while ECB, BOJ, BOK cut rates creates maximum monetary divergence in 20 years. USD strength pressures emerging market debt and commodity prices.

ranked_signals.title: Antarctic Ice Sheet Mass Loss Accelerates to 250 Gt/Year -- 2x Faster Than 2020 Models Predicted
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Antarctic ice loss at 250 Gt/year doubles model predictions, implying sea level rise of 50cm by 2060 rather than previously projected 30cm. Coastal infrastructure globally at risk.

ranked_signals.title: Japan Launches 2 Trillion Yen AI National Strategy -- Targets Top-3 Global AI Capability by 2030
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Japan 2T yen AI strategy is the largest national AI investment in Asia. Combined with semiconductor revival (Rapidus 2nm), Japan positions as AI competitor to US and China.

ranked_signals.title: EU Digital Markets Act Enforcement: Apple and Meta Face Combined EUR 38B in Fines
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Record DMA fines signal EU willingness to enforce digital market regulation at scale. Creates precedent for global tech platform regulation.

ranked_signals.title: Global Water Stress Index: 3.6 Billion People Face Water Scarcity by 2030 -- WMO Report
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: WMO report projects water scarcity affecting 45% of global population by 2030. Intersection of climate change, population growth, and agricultural demand creates compound resource crisis.

ranked_signals.title: China Unveils 6G Standard Proposal at ITU -- Terahertz Communication Framework
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: China submitting 6G standard proposal at ITU positions it to lead next-generation communications standards. Terahertz communication framework could enable 1 Tbps wireless speeds.

ranked_signals.title: African Union Digital Single Market Goes Live -- 1.4 Billion People Connected Under One Digital Trade Framework
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: AU Digital Single Market launch is the largest digital trade integration in history by population. Could transform African e-commerce and fintech if implementation succeeds.

ranked_signals.title: Germany Hydrogen Economy Reaches Industrial Scale -- 15 GW Electrolyzer Capacity by Q4 2026
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Germany achieving 15 GW electrolyzer capacity validates green hydrogen at industrial scale. Combined with 100% renewable grid target, creates the first major economy hydrogen supply chain.

ranked_signals.title: Global AI Chip Shortage Deepens -- TSMC Lead Times Extend to 52 Weeks
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: TSMC AI chip lead times at 52 weeks indicate structural supply-demand imbalance. Drives urgency for alternative compute sources including sovereign cloud (connects to WF3 NVIDIA Korea signal).

ranked_signals.title: Russia-India Bilateral Trade Hits B Milestone -- De-dollarization of Energy Commerce Accelerates
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Russia-India trade reaching B with 65% in non-USD currencies demonstrates de-dollarization of major bilateral energy trade is operationally feasible at scale.

ranked_signals.title: Japan Supreme Court Rules AI-Generated Content Not Protected by Copyright -- Global Precedent
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: Japan court ruling that AI-generated works are not copyrightable creates global legal precedent. Challenges economic models of AI creative tools companies.

ranked_signals.title: EU Rewilding Initiative: 20% of European Farmland to Return to Nature by 2035
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: EU rewilding at 20% of farmland represents radical agricultural policy shift. Food security implications balance against biodiversity recovery and carbon sequestration.

ranked_signals.title: India UPI Processes 20 Billion Monthly Transactions -- Becomes World Largest Real-Time Payment System
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: India UPI at 20B monthly transactions surpasses all other payment systems combined. Creates template for national digital payment infrastructure that could be exported globally.

ranked_signals.title: Sahel Region Climate-Conflict Nexus: 5 Million Climate Displaced by 2026 -- UNHCR
ranked_signals.impact_assessment: UNHCR reports 5M climate-displaced in Sahel, where climate stress intersects with armed conflict. Represents emerging pattern of compound climate-security crises.
